lines.speaker: Morgiana
lines.text: Afternoon. I'm Morgiana, and by all means, let yourself in...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, hey! The door was open...

lines.speaker: Morgiana
lines.text: Indeed! A family heirloom of mine, passed down from my father.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh? Are you from a family of famous knights?

lines.speaker: Morgiana
lines.text: Oh, nothing... it's just... old memories. I'm getting old, as you can probably see. My family have all died to war. This is meant to be my retirement.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Retirement? Then why still wear the armour? Especially with how hot it is here.

lines.speaker: Morgiana
lines.text: I find it's best to be prepared in this region. Bandits regularly visit this fine oasis, and they ask fewer questions when they see me in armour.

lines.speaker: Morgiana
lines.text: Well... I think it's quite nice! I prefer a warm cup of Saradomin's Wisdom, a special recipe of mine.

lines.speaker: Morgiana
lines.text: Bit of a family secret. A fine blend of herbs that are quite magical.

lines.speaker: Morgiana
lines.text: Quite. Perhaps I'll see you around...
